ogTitle: Wangaratta South vs Wangoom: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wangaratta South and Wangoom.
heading: Wangaratta South vs Wangoom — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wangaratta South, Victoria and Wangoom, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wangoom has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Wangaratta South (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wangaratta South or Wangoom safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wangaratta South has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Wangoom scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wangaratta South scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Wangoom scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wangaratta South or Wangoom?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wangoom has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
